answers:
### FAILURE (insufficient data)

#### Search Terms, Engines, Filters Used
- "CNRS AI ambitions European technological sovereignty strategy document"
- "CNRS position paper on AI"
- "CNRS strategy document on EU AI sovereignty"
- "CNRS AI programme EU collaboration"
- "CNRS EU AI digital sovereignty"

#### Gaps Encountered
- Most CNRS URLs led to press releases or announcements that discuss AI in general but do not provide detailed strategic documents.
- Access issues to some URLs, such as those leading to request rejections or requiring CAPTCHA verifications (e.g., [Tandfonline](https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/full/10.1080/13501763.2024.2318475)).
- No direct CNRS strategic documents related to AI and European technological sovereignty were found.

#### New Angles That Could Work
- Directly reaching out to CNRS via email or contact forms on their official website to request access to official strategy documents.
- Exploring EU institutions' websites for any publications or strategic documents that explicitly mention CNRS's involvement in AI and European technological sovereignty.
- Checking additional repositories or databases for CNRS publications and reports not indexed by standard search engines.

#### Nature of the Error
- Some URLs returned "Request Rejected" messages.
- One URL required manual verification (CAPTCHA).

#### What Human Assistance Is Required
- Manual intervention to verify CAPTCHAs and access Tandfonline documents.
- Contacting CNRS directly to obtain official strategy documents related to AI and European technological sovereignty.
